game_info.title: Gato Roboto - JS Clone
game_info.concept:
Pounce inside of your cozy armored mech and set off on a dangerous trek through an alien underworld full of irritable creatures and treacherous obstacles in a valiant effort to save your stranded captain and his crashed spaceship. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/916730/Gato_Roboto/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Pounce inside of your cozy armored mech and set off on a dangerous trek through an alien underworld full of irritable creatures and treacherous obstacles in a valiant effort to save your stranded captain and his crashed spaceship.

Pounce inside of your cozy armored mech and set off on a dangerous trek through an alien underworld full of irritable creatures and treacherous obstacles in a valiant effort to save your stranded captain and his crashed spaceship. Tiptoe outside the friendly confines of your technological marvel and follow your feline instincts through tight tunnels and mysterious waterways to scavenge for new weapons and gear. Adventure awaits the most curious of cats in Gato Roboto!



* Explore the underground labyrinth of a deep space outpost and uncover the dastardly deeds that unfolded before your arrival.

* Blast and dash your way through enemies and obstacles in an agile mech suit to face the guardians stationed precariously throughout the base.

* Cautiously venture outside the mech and risk all nine lives to explore areas inaccessible to your bulky, mechanical armor.

* Discover secrets abound and gather new weapons and items to help open up new areas on your journey through dozens of handcrafted environments.
game_info.description: Piloting a specialized Battle Mech, you must traverse a hostile alien underworld to rescue your stranded captain. The environment is treacherous, filled with robotic guardians and hazardous terrain. Use your Mech's firepower and mobility to blast enemies and leap across chasms. In tight spots, you can eject from your Mech to explore as a nimble cat, capable of fitting into small tunnels to find secrets, though you are vulnerable outside your armor. Reach the crashed ship to win.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move Left/Right, Aim Up/Down
- Space: Jump (Hold for higher jump)
- Z: Fire Weapon (Mech Mode) / Meow (Cat Mode)
- Shift: Eject from Mech / Enter Mech (when near)
- ESC: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)
- ENTER: Start Game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify that the player can reach the end of the level using the Mech.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will move the player to the right towards the goal coordinate. It will detect obstacles and pits to jump over them, and fire the weapon when enemies are detected in front of the player.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should traverse the level, defeating or avoiding enemies, and collide with the Goal entity, triggering the "GAME_OVER_WIN" state.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify stability under random input stress (Fuzz Testing).
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller will input random allowed keys (Arrows, Jump, Shoot, Dash/Eject) at random intervals.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should run without crashing or throwing errors for a duration of 30 seconds, regardless of whether the player wins or loses.
